title: Sofia Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Sofia as she discovers numbers 1 through 5 by counting things that make her feel happy, from one sunny day to five colorful balloons.

pages.text: Hi! I'm Sofia. I love counting happy things! Come count with me!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes stands in a bright garden, smiling and waving. The number 0 appears in decorative patterns around her.
illustration.alt: Sofia waving in a garden with decorative number 0

pages.text: ONE sunny day makes me smile! The sun is warm and bright.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes points up at one large, smiling yellow sun in a blue sky. The number 1 is prominently displayed in golden colors.
illustration.alt: Sofia pointing at one sunny day with number 1

pages.text: TWO fluffy puppies make me giggle! They are so soft and playful.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits on grass with two adorable puppies playing around her. The number 2 appears in playful patterns with paw prints.
illustration.alt: Sofia with two puppies and number 2

pages.text: THREE pretty flowers smell so sweet! I feel peaceful and calm.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes gently smells three colorful flowers in a garden. The number 3 is decorated with floral patterns and petals.
illustration.alt: Sofia smelling three flowers with number 3

pages.text: FOUR yummy cookies make me excited! They taste like happiness.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sits at a table with four round chocolate chip cookies arranged neatly. The number 4 appears in cookie-colored browns and golds.
illustration.alt: Sofia with four cookies and number 4

pages.text: FIVE colorful balloons make me jump with joy! I love all the bright colors!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes holds five brightly colored balloons (red, blue, yellow, green, purple). The number 5 is displayed in rainbow colors with celebration patterns.
illustration.alt: Sofia holding five colorful balloons with number 5

pages.text: Counting happy things makes me feel wonderful! What happy things can you count?

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes surrounded by all the happy things she counted: the sun, puppies, flowers, cookies, and balloons. Numbers 1-5 dance around her in magical patterns.
illustration.alt: Sofia surrounded by all counted items with numbers 1-5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many sunny days made Sofia smile?
questions.explanation: Sofia saw ONE sunny day that made her smile!

questions.question: What made Sofia feel excited?
questions.explanation: The four yummy cookies made Sofia feel excited!

questions.question: How many balloons did Sofia have?
questions.explanation: Sofia had FIVE colorful balloons that made her jump with joy!
